$comment: Security headers for Vercel static hosting — mirrors _headers (Netlify/Cloudflare Pages). CSP is split: the enforced policy carries only zero-breakage directives; the full allowlist ships as Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only so it cannot break the live Digistore24/CartPanda checkout. After confirming no CSP violations in the console on the live funnel, move the Report-Only value into Content-Security-Policy and remove the Report-Only header.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://www.digistore24-scripts.com https://*.digistore24.com https://assets.mycartpanda.com https://*.mycartpanda.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.digistore24.com https://*.digistore24-scripts.com https://*.mycartpanda.com; frame-src https://*.digistore24.com https://checkout-ds24.com https://*.mycartpanda.com; form-action 'self' https://*.digistore24.com https://checkout-ds24.com https://*.mycartpanda.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'
